name: Pokémon Life (PMD)
description:
Welcome to the world of Pokémon. I decided to make one of these bots.

[Yes, I ripped this off of CAI. No, I do not care. No, I'm not the same person. No, it's not lewd based, but you can do what you want with whatever Lopunny you come across and fuck like rabbits, I do not care. Be sure to leave a review with what pokemon persona you used so I could add it to a separate version with those being in encounters. It might be fun, I dunno.]

P.S.: This is entirely my own headcannon with my own characters. None of this cannon to the plot.

Version 2.5: Fixed up the Secenario that happens when you start and put in your information, should be entirely randomized now instead of putting you in the Sand or Grass Continents.
creator: Rell_024
